1→defmodule TodoList.MixProject do
     2→  use Mix.Project
     3→
     4→  def project do
     5→    [
     6→      app: :todo_list,
     7→      version: "0.1.0",
     8→      elixir: "~> 1.15",
     9→      elixirc_paths: elixirc_paths(Mix.env()),
    10→      start_permanent: Mix.env() == :prod,
    11→      aliases: aliases(),
    12→      deps: deps(),
    13→      compilers: [:phoenix_live_view] ++ Mix.compilers(),
    14→      listeners: [Phoenix.CodeReloader],
    15→      dialyzer: [plt_add_apps: [:ex_unit]]
    16→    ]
    17→  end
    18→
    19→  # Configuration for the OTP application.
    20→  #
    21→  # Type `mix help compile.app` for more information.
    22→  def application do
    23→    [
    24→      mod: {TodoList.Application, []},
    25→      extra_applications: [:logger, :runtime_tools]
    26→    ]
    27→  end
    28→
    29→  def cli do
    30→    [
    31→      preferred_envs: [precommit: :test]
    32→    ]
    33→  end
    34→
    35→  # Specifies which paths to compile per environment.
    36→  defp elixirc_paths(:test), do: ["lib", "test/support"]
    37→  defp elixirc_paths(_), do: ["lib"]
    38→
    39→  # Specifies your project dependencies.
    40→  #
    41→  # Type `mix help deps` for examples and options.
    42→  defp deps do
    43→    [
    44→      {:phoenix, "~> 1.8.3"},
    45→      {:phoenix_ecto, "~> 4.5"},
    46→      {:ecto_sql, "~> 3.13"},
    47→      {:postgrex, ">= 0.0.0"},
    48→      {:phoenix_html, "~> 4.1"},
    49→      {:phoenix_live_reload, "~> 1.2", only: :dev},
    50→      {:phoenix_live_view, "~> 1.1.0"},
    51→      {:lazy_html, ">= 0.1.0", only: :test},
    52→      {:phoenix_live_dashboard, "~> 0.8.3"},
    53→      {:esbuild, "~> 0.10", runtime: Mix.env() == :dev},
    54→      {:tailwind, "~> 0.3", runtime: Mix.env() == :dev},
    55→      {:heroicons,
    56→       github: "tailwindlabs/heroicons",
    57→       tag: "v2.2.0",
    58→       sparse: "optimized",
    59→       app: false,
    60→       compile: false,
    61→       depth: 1},
    62→      {:swoosh, "~> 1.16"},
    63→      {:req, "~> 0.5"},
    64→      {:telemetry_metrics, "~> 1.0"},
    65→      {:telemetry_poller, "~> 1.0"},
    66→      {:gettext, "~> 1.0"},
    67→      {:jason, "~> 1.2"},
    68→      {:dns_cluster, "~> 0.2.0"},
    69→      {:bandit, "~> 1.5"},
    70→      {:phoenix_storybook, "~> 0.9.0", only: [:dev, :test]},
    71→      {:dialyxir, "~> 1.4", only: [:dev, :test], runtime: false}
    72→    ]
    73→  end
    74→
    75→  # Aliases are shortcuts or tasks specific to the current project.
    76→  # For example, to install project dependencies and perform other setup tasks, run:
    77→  #
    78→  #     $ mix setup
    79→  #
    80→  # See the documentation for `Mix` for more info on aliases.
    81→  defp aliases do
    82→    [
    83→      setup: ["deps.get", "ecto.setup", "assets.setup", "assets.build"],
    84→      "ecto.setup": ["ecto.create", "ecto.migrate", "run priv/repo/seeds.exs"],
    85→      "ecto.reset": ["ecto.drop", "ecto.setup"],
    86→      test: ["ecto.create --quiet", "ecto.migrate --quiet", "test"],
    87→      "assets.setup": ["tailwind.install --if-missing", "esbuild.install --if-missing"],
    88→      "assets.build": [
    89→        "compile",
    90→        "tailwind todo_list",
    91→        "esbuild todo_list",
    92→        "tailwind storybook",
    93→        "esbuild storybook"
    94→      ],
    95→      "assets.deploy": [
    96→        "tailwind todo_list --minify",
    97→        "esbuild todo_list --minify",
    98→        "phx.digest"
    99→      ],
   100→      precommit: [
   101→        "deps.unlock --unused",
   102→        "compile --warnings-as-errors",
   103→        "format --check-formatted",
   104→        "dialyzer",
   105→        "test"
   106→      ]
   107→    ]
   108→  end
   109→end

1→# This file is responsible for configuring your application
     2→# and its dependencies with the aid of the Config module.

     4→# This configuration file is loaded before any dependency and
     5→# is restricted to this project.
     6→
     7→# General application configuration
     8→import Config
     9→
    10→config :todo_list,
    11→  ecto_repos: [TodoList.Repo],
    12→  generators: [timestamp_type: :utc_datetime]
    13→
    14→# Configure the endpoint
    15→config :todo_list, TodoListWeb.Endpoint,
    16→  url: [host: "localhost"],
    17→  adapter: Bandit.PhoenixAdapter,
    18→  render_errors: [
    19→    formats: [html: TodoListWeb.ErrorHTML, json: TodoListWeb.ErrorJSON],
    20→    layout: false
    21→  ],
    22→  pubsub_server: TodoList.PubSub,
    23→  live_view: [signing_salt: "d+Zxmuln"]
    24→
    25→# Configure the mailer
    26→#
    27→# By default it uses the "Local" adapter which stores the emails
    28→# locally. You can see the emails in your browser, at "/dev/mailbox".
    29→#
    30→# For production it's recommended to configure a different adapter
    31→# at the `config/runtime.exs`.
    32→config :todo_list, TodoList.Mailer, adapter: Swoosh.Adapters.Local
    33→
    34→# Configure esbuild (the version is required)
    35→config :esbuild,
    36→  version: "0.25.4",
    37→  todo_list: [
    38→    args:
    39→      ~w(js/app.js --bundle --target=es2022 --outdir=../priv/static/assets/js --external:/fonts/* --external:/images/* --alias:@=.),
    40→    cd: Path.expand("../assets", __DIR__),
    41→    env: %{"NODE_PATH" => [Path.expand("../deps", __DIR__), Mix.Project.build_path()]}
    42→  ],
    43→  storybook: [
    44→    args:
    45→      ~w(js/storybook.js --bundle --target=es2022 --outdir=../priv/static/assets --external:/fonts/* --external:/images/* --alias:@=.),
    46→    cd: Path.expand("../assets", __DIR__),
    47→    env: %{"NODE_PATH" => [Path.expand("../deps", __DIR__), Mix.Project.build_path()]}
    48→  ]
    49→
    50→# Configure tailwind (the version is required)
    51→config :tailwind,
    52→  version: "4.1.12",
    53→  todo_list: [
    54→    args: ~w(
    55→      --input=assets/css/app.css
    56→      --output=priv/static/assets/css/app.css
    57→    ),
    58→    cd: Path.expand("..", __DIR__)
    59→  ],
    60→  storybook: [
    61→    args: ~w(
    62→      --input=assets/css/storybook.css
    63→      --output=priv/static/assets/storybook.css
    64→    ),
    65→    cd: Path.expand("..", __DIR__)
    66→  ]
    67→
    68→# Configure Elixir's Logger
    69→config :logger, :default_formatter,
    70→  format: "$time $metadata[$level] $message\n",
    71→  metadata: [:request_id]
    72→
    73→# Use Jason for JSON parsing in Phoenix
    74→config :phoenix, :json_library, Jason
    75→
    76→# Import environment specific config. This must remain at the bottom
    77→# of this file so it overrides the configuration defined above.
    78→import_config "#{config_env()}.exs"

file.content:
defmodule TodoList.MixProject do
  use Mix.Project

  def project do
    [
      app: :todo_list,
      version: "0.1.0",
      elixir: "~> 1.15",
      elixirc_paths: elixirc_paths(Mix.env()),
      start_permanent: Mix.env() == :prod,
      aliases: aliases(),
      deps: deps(),
      compilers: [:phoenix_live_view] ++ Mix.compilers(),
      listeners: [Phoenix.CodeReloader],
      dialyzer: [plt_add_apps: [:ex_unit]],
      event_stores: [TodoList.EventStore]
    ]
  end

  # Configuration for the OTP application.
  #
  # Type `mix help compile.app` for more information.
  def application do
    [
      mod: {TodoList.Application, []},
      extra_applications: [:logger, :runtime_tools]
    ]
  end

  def cli do
    [
      preferred_envs: [precommit: :test]
    ]
  end

  # Specifies which paths to compile per environment.
  defp elixirc_paths(:test), do: ["lib", "test/support"]
  defp elixirc_paths(_), do: ["lib"]

  # Specifies your project dependencies.
  #
  # Type `mix help deps` for examples and options.
  defp deps do
    [
      {:phoenix, "~> 1.8.3"},
      {:phoenix_ecto, "~> 4.5"},
      {:ecto_sql, "~> 3.13"},
      {:postgrex, ">= 0.0.0"},
      {:phoenix_html, "~> 4.1"},
      {:phoenix_live_reload, "~> 1.2", only: :dev},
      {:phoenix_live_view, "~> 1.1.0"},
      {:lazy_html, ">= 0.1.0", only: :test},
      {:phoenix_live_dashboard, "~> 0.8.3"},
      {:esbuild, "~> 0.10", runtime: Mix.env() == :dev},
      {:tailwind, "~> 0.3", runtime: Mix.env() == :dev},
      {:heroicons,
       github: "tailwindlabs/heroicons",
       tag: "v2.2.0",
       sparse: "optimized",
       app: false,
       compile: false,
       depth: 1},
      {:swoosh, "~> 1.16"},
      {:req, "~> 0.5"},
      {:telemetry_metrics, "~> 1.0"},
      {:telemetry_poller, "~> 1.0"},
      {:gettext, "~> 1.0"},
      {:jason, "~> 1.2"},
      {:dns_cluster, "~> 0.2.0"},
      {:bandit, "~> 1.5"},
      {:phoenix_storybook, "~> 0.9.0", only: [:dev, :test]},
      {:dialyxir, "~> 1.4", only: [:dev, :test], runtime: false},
      {:commanded, "~> 1.4"},
      {:commanded_eventstore_adapter, "~> 1.4"},
      {:commanded_ecto_projections, "~> 1.3"},
      {:eventstore, "~> 1.4"},
      {:commanded_boilerplate, github: "jwilger/commanded_boilerplate"},
      {:uuidv7, "~> 1.0"}
    ]
  end

  # Aliases are shortcuts or tasks specific to the current project.
  # For example, to install project dependencies and perform other setup tasks, run:
  #
  #     $ mix setup
  #
  # See the documentation for `Mix` for more info on aliases.
  defp aliases do
    [
      setup: ["deps.get", "ecto.setup", "assets.setup", "assets.build"],
      "ecto.setup": ["ecto.create", "ecto.migrate", "run priv/repo/seeds.exs"],
      "ecto.reset": ["ecto.drop", "ecto.setup"],
      test: ["ecto.create --quiet", "ecto.migrate --quiet", "test"],
      "assets.setup": ["tailwind.install --if-missing", "esbuild.install --if-missing"],
      "assets.build": [
        "compile",
        "tailwind todo_list",
        "esbuild todo_list",
        "tailwind storybook",
        "esbuild storybook"
      ],
      "assets.deploy": [
        "tailwind todo_list --minify",
        "esbuild todo_list --minify",
        "phx.digest"
      ],
      precommit: [
        "deps.unlock --unused",
        "compile --warnings-as-errors",
        "format --check-formatted",
        "dialyzer",
        "test"
      ]
    ]
  end
end

toolUseResult.originalFile:
defmodule TodoList.Application do
  # See https://hexdocs.pm/elixir/Application.html
  # for more information on OTP Applications
  @moduledoc false

  use Application

  @impl true
  def start(_type, _args) do
    children = [
      TodoListWeb.Telemetry,
      TodoList.Repo,
      {DNSCluster, query: Application.get_env(:todo_list, :dns_cluster_query) || :ignore},
      {Phoenix.PubSub, name: TodoList.PubSub},
      # Start a worker by calling: TodoList.Worker.start_link(arg)
      # {TodoList.Worker, arg},
      # Start to serve requests, typically the last entry
      TodoListWeb.Endpoint
    ]

    # See https://hexdocs.pm/elixir/Supervisor.html
    # for other strategies and supported options
    opts = [strategy: :one_for_one, name: TodoList.Supervisor]
    Supervisor.start_link(children, opts)
  end

  # Tell Phoenix to update the endpoint configuration
  # whenever the application is updated.
  @impl true
  def config_change(changed, _new, removed) do
    TodoListWeb.Endpoint.config_change(changed, removed)
    :ok
  end
end

- Install event sourcing dependencies: commanded, commanded_eventstore_adapter, commanded_ecto_projections, eventstore, commanded_boilerplate (github: jwilger), uuidv7
- Create \`TodoList.App\` (Commanded application module with router registration)
- Create \`TodoList.Router\` (Commanded command router, commands will self-register via boilerplate)
- Create \`TodoList.EventStore\` (EventStore module for PostgreSQL backend)
- Configure dev environment: PostgreSQL event store at \`todo_list_eventstore_dev\` (separate from Ecto app DB)
- Configure test environment: in-memory event store adapter for fast, isolated tests
- Add \`TodoList.App\` to the OTP supervision tree
- Add \`event_stores: [TodoList.EventStore]\` to project config for mix event_store tasks

## New modules

| Module | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| \`TodoList.App\` | Commanded application (routes commands, manages aggregates) |
| \`TodoList.Router\` | Command router (commands self-register via commanded_boilerplate) |
| \`TodoList.EventStore\` | EventStore backend (PostgreSQL dev/prod, in-memory test) |

- [x] \`mix deps.get\` resolves all dependencies
- [x] \`mix compile --warnings-as-errors\` passes (no warnings in project code)
- [x] \`mix format --check-formatted\` passes

| # | Task | Status |
|---|------|--------|
| 1 | Add dialyxir + update precommit | Merged (PR #42) |

The entire infrastructure epic is done. All seven Task Management workflow slices (AddTask, CompleteTask, CompletedTaskList, ReopenTask, ChangeTaskDescription, ReprioritizeTask, DeleteTask) are now unblocked and ready for implementation. 

The foundation has been laid for your magnificently over-engineered todo list. I suppose there's a certain grim satisfaction in that, though satisfaction itself feels rather overrated.
